query:
-- Çift KPI maddelerini tespit et
SELECT 
  `period`, 
  `branchName`, 
  `target`, 
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM `kpi_target_cards_detail`
GROUP BY `period`, `branchName`, `target`
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY count DESC;

-- Çift KPI maddelerini teke düşür - her grup için ilk kaydı tut, diğerlerini sil
DELETE FROM `kpi_target_cards_detail`
WHERE `id` NOT IN (
  SELECT MIN(`id`)
  FROM (
    SELECT MIN(`id`) as `id`
    FROM `kpi_target_cards_detail`
    GROUP BY `period`, `branchName`, `target`
  ) as keep_ids
);
